description: Core expense tracking with full CRUD: add form with amount, title, category/subcategory, payment method, card, date, notes, comments, and receipt upload. Expenses listed with search/filter/pagination grouped by date. Detail page with view/edit/delete modes. Category system with emoji icons.

subDeliverables.title: Add expense form
subDeliverables.description: Full expense form component with fields: amount (required), title, category (required), subcategory (conditional), date, note, comments, payment method (card/cash), card selector (conditional), and receipt file upload with preview.
acceptanceCriteria: Amount and category are required fields
Subcategory dropdown filtered by selected category
Card selector appears only when payment method is 'card'
Receipt upload shows image preview with delete option
Date defaults to today

subDeliverables.title: Add expense page (mobile)
subDeliverables.description: Full-page add expense view for mobile, integrating the ExpenseForm component with proper layout and navigation.
acceptanceCriteria: Page renders ExpenseForm component
Back navigation to previous page
Success redirects to expenses list or home

subDeliverables.title: Expenses list with filters
subDeliverables.description: Searchable, filterable list of expenses with controls for text search, category filter, payment method filter, and date range selection.
acceptanceCriteria: Text search filters by title and note
Category dropdown filters by expense category
Payment method filter (card/cash/all)
Date range picker for custom periods

subDeliverables.title: Expenses grouped by date with pagination
subDeliverables.description: Expense list items grouped under date headers (Today, Yesterday, or formatted date). Paginated at 50 items per page.
acceptanceCriteria: Expenses grouped under date section headers
Date headers use relative labels (Today, Yesterday)
50 expenses per page with page navigation controls

subDeliverables.title: Expense detail page with view/edit modes
subDeliverables.description: Individual expense detail view showing all fields. Edit mode allows inline modification of all expense fields.
acceptanceCriteria: View mode displays all expense fields read-only
Edit mode enables inline editing of all fields
Supports ?from=home query param for back navigation
Receipt image displayed if present

subDeliverables.title: Expense delete functionality
subDeliverables.description: Delete button with confirmation dialog on the expense detail page. Removes expense and redirects to list.
acceptanceCriteria: Delete button visible on expense detail page
Confirmation dialog prevents accidental deletion
Successful delete redirects to expenses list

subDeliverables.title: Receipt upload to Supabase storage
subDeliverables.description: File input for receipt images uploaded to Supabase Storage. Preview shown after upload with option to remove.
acceptanceCriteria: File input accepts image files
Image uploaded to Supabase Storage bucket
Preview thumbnail shown after upload
Delete button removes image from storage

subDeliverables.title: Category and subcategory system with emojis
subDeliverables.description: Predefined categories and subcategories stored in ft_categories and ft_subcategories tables. Each category has an emoji icon for visual identification in lists and badges.
acceptanceCriteria: Categories loaded from ft_categories with emoji field
Subcategories filtered by parent category_id
CategoryBadge component displays emoji + name
Categories used consistently across forms and lists
